## Context

Why does this need to happen? What's the situation today.

## What should happen

In plain prose — how we'll know it's done.

## Areas it touches

backend · frontend · infra · docs · security  <!-- delete the ones that don't apply -->

## References

Related ADRs, entity notes, or issues (e.g. `#12`, `[[asset]]`, `ADR-0023`) — if any.
